user.title: Position Tracker
user.description: Name the device that groups your tracked covers (e.g., "Theater Bed Position").

add_cover.title: Add tracked position
add_cover.description: Pick a source cover to wrap with position tracking. "Presses to full travel" is how many open-cover presses move it from fully closed to fully open. A number entity will be created exposing 0–100% as a slider.

menu.title: Tracked positions
menu.description:
{count} configured: {names}

Add another tracked position or finish setup.

error.not_a_cover: Source must be a cover entity.
error.duplicate_source: This source cover is already being tracked.

init.title: Calibration
init.description:
Adjust the press-to-full-travel calibration for each tracked cover.

{covers}

set_position.name: Sync position
set_position.description: Manually set a tracked position number to a known value.

entity_id.name: Tracked position
entity_id.description: The position_tracker number entity to sync.

position.name: Position
position.description: The known position (0 = fully closed, 100 = fully open).
